Frequently Asked Questions
Q1. When did the PNB Local Bank Officer LBO Online Application Process 2026 Start?
The online application process started on 20 July 2026 .
Q2. What is the Exam Date for PNB Local Bank Officer LBO Exam 2026 ?
The Examination will be conducted in August / September 2026 .
Q3. Where can I find the syllabus for the PNB Local Bank Officer LBO Examination 2026?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete details.
Q4. How can I download the PNB PNB Local Bank Officer LBO Notification 2026 PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
Q5. What is the last date to apply online for Punjab National Bank PNB Local Bank Officer LBO 2026?
The last date to apply online is 09 August 2026..
Q6. What is the last date to pay the application fee?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 09 August 2026 .
Q7. How can I apply for PNB Local Bank Officer LBO?
Candidates can apply online through the official recruitment link available on SarkariResult.com (Since 2012) – Official Website of Sarkari Result®
